001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.control;
002
003import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message;
006import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType;
007import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.MessageProps;
008import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.control.CgmRiseFallAlertResponse;
009
010import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
011
012/**
013 * Sets a CGM rise or fall rate alert threshold.
014 *
015 * Cargo layout (4 bytes, little-endian):
016 *   [0]  alertType  uint8  - 0=RISE, 1=FALL
017 *   [1]  enable     uint8  - 0=disabled, 1=enabled
018 *   [2]  mgPerDl    uint8  - rate threshold in mg/dL/min
019 *   [3]  bitmask    uint8  - change bitmask (bits: 0=enabled, 1=minValue)
020 */
021/**
022 * Sets a CGM rise or fall rate alert threshold.
023 *
024 * Cargo layout (4 bytes, little-endian):
025 *   [0]  alertType  uint8  - 0=RISE, 1=FALL
026 *   [1]  enable     uint8  - 0=disabled, 1=enabled
027 *   [2]  mgPerDl    uint8  - rate threshold in mg/dL/min
028 *   [3]  bitmask    uint8  - change bitmask (bits: 0=enabled, 1=minValue)
029 *
030
031 *
032 * <br>
033 *
034 * Request message for {@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.control.CgmRiseFallAlertResponse}, opCode -60, size 4
035 *
036 * <br>
037 *
038 * 
039 * <table border='1'>
040 * <caption>Message properties:</caption>
041 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>opCode</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>-60</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
042 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>size</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>4</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
043 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>type</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType#REQUEST}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
044 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>characteristic</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic#CONTROL}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
045 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>response</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.control.CgmRiseFallAlertResponse}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
046 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>signed</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>true</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
047 * </table>
048 */@MessageProps(
049    opCode=-60,
050    size=4,
051    type=MessageType.REQUEST,
052    characteristic=Characteristic.CONTROL,
053    response=CgmRiseFallAlertResponse.class,
054    signed=true
055)
056public class CgmRiseFallAlertRequest extends Message {
057    // alertType values
058    public static final int ALERT_TYPE_RISE = 0;
059    public static final int ALERT_TYPE_FALL = 1;
060
061    private int alertType;
062    private boolean enable;
063    private int mgPerDl;
064    private int bitmask;
065
066    public CgmRiseFallAlertRequest() {}
067
068    public CgmRiseFallAlertRequest(int alertType, boolean enable, int mgPerDl, int bitmask) {
069        this.alertType = alertType;
070        this.enable = enable;
071        this.mgPerDl = mgPerDl;
072        this.bitmask = bitmask;
073        this.cargo = buildCargo(alertType, enable, mgPerDl, bitmask);
074    }
075
076    /**
077     * <table border="1">
078     * <caption>Byte layout for CgmRiseFallAlertRequest.buildCargo(...):</caption>
079     * <tr><th>Offset</th><th>Description</th></tr>
080     * <tr><td>0</td><td><code>(byte) alertType</code></td></tr>
081     * <tr><td>1</td><td><code>(byte) (enable ? 1 : 0)</code></td></tr>
082     * <tr><td>2</td><td><code>(byte) mgPerDl</code></td></tr>
083     * <tr><td>3</td><td><code>(byte) bitmask</code></td></tr>
084     * </table>
085     */
086    public static byte[] buildCargo(int alertType, boolean enable, int mgPerDl, int bitmask) {
087        return Bytes.combine(
088            new byte[]{ (byte) alertType },
089            new byte[]{ (byte) (enable ? 1 : 0) },
090            new byte[]{ (byte) mgPerDl },
091            new byte[]{ (byte) bitmask }
092        );
093    }
094
095    /**
096     * <table border="1">
097     * <caption>Parsed fields for CgmRiseFallAlertRequest:</caption>
098     * <tr><td><code>alertType</code></td><td><code>raw[0] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
099     * <tr><td><code>enable</code></td><td><code>(raw[1] &amp; 0xFF) != 0</code></td></tr>
100     * <tr><td><code>mgPerDl</code></td><td><code>raw[2] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
101     * <tr><td><code>bitmask</code></td><td><code>raw[3] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
102     * </table>
103     */
104    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
105        raw = removeSignedRequestHmacBytes(raw);
106        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == props().size());
107        this.cargo = raw;
108        this.alertType = raw[0] & 0xFF;
109        this.enable = (raw[1] & 0xFF) != 0;
110        this.mgPerDl = raw[2] & 0xFF;
111        this.bitmask = raw[3] & 0xFF;
112    }
113
114    public int getAlertType() {
115        return alertType;
116    }
117
118    public boolean isEnable() {
119        return enable;
120    }
121
122    public int getMgPerDl() {
123        return mgPerDl;
124    }
125
126    public int getBitmask() {
127        return bitmask;
128    }
129}
